title: Metals extend gains as China boost support for property sector
section_path: Metals extend gains as China boost support for property sector
section_path_text: Metals extend gains as China boost support for property sector
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
The prospect of further stimulus measures in China continued to support commodity markets. Tightening supplies in the energy sector were also supportive. Image reference: 1690323494487.png | assets/2023-07-26_metals-extend-gains-as-china-boost-support-for-property-sector_img_1690323494487_bc7921ca278f.png
Copper and iron ore extended yesterday's rally after China pledged support for its beleaguered property sector.
